value.found_quote: For example, Claude Code is a flexible agent harness, and we used its core primitives through the Agent SDK to build our long-running agent harness.
value.rationale: The page is an Anthropic engineering article about evals and observability for AI agents, and it explicitly describes Claude Code as a flexible agent harness used via the Agent SDK to build a long-running agent harness — matching the claim verbatim.
